task: Flagship expert task: Confidential-Computing Attestation Policy Acceptance Review. Reality context: a regulated analytics workload can launch only if enclave attestation evidence satisfies policy. Embedded packet: nodes: N1 TEE=SEV-SNP measurement_match=Y firmware_current=Y debug_disabled=Y, N2 TEE=TDX match=Y firmware=N debug=Y, N3 TEE=SEV-SNP match=N firmware=Y debug=Y; requirements measurement_match, current_firmware, debug_disabled; workload sensitivity=regulated; actions firmware_update, quarantine_node, measurement_rebuild. Rules and constraints: Classify nodes, recommend scheduling policy, and state residual trust assumptions. Required work: deliver attestation_policy_review.xlsx + enclave_release_memo.md. The deliverables must include formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, validation checks, uncertainty notes, sensitivity checks around the controlling thresholds, and a final decision table with pass/warn/fail/needs_review labels. Use only the embedded packet. Do not import external data, invent missing values, or hide unresolved assumptions.
